ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fiscal_years" (
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal year */,
  "fiscal_year_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiscal year (e.g., 2010 to 2011) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fiscal year is current */,
  "total_clients" INTEGER /* Total number of clients for the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_delays" (
  "payment_delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment delay entry */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year */,
  "one_to_three_days" REAL /* Percentage of payments delayed by 1 to 3 days */,
  "four_to_ten_days" REAL /* Percentage of payments delayed by 4 to 10 days */,
  "eleven_to_thirty_days" REAL /* Percentage of payments delayed by 11 to 30 days */,
  "thirty_one_to_ninety_days" REAL /* Percentage of payments delayed by 31 to 90 days */,
  "ninety_one_to_three_hundred_sixty_five_days" REAL /* Percentage of payments delayed by 91 to 365 days */,
  "more_than_three_hundred_sixty_five_days" REAL /* Percentage of payments delayed by more than 365 days */,
  "total_payments" INTEGER /* Total payments for the fiscal year */,
  "total_delayed_payments" INTEGER /* Total delayed payments for the fiscal year */,
  "avg_delay_days" REAL /* Average delay days for the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_delays_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client operates in */,
  "total_invoices" INTEGER /* Total invoices for the client */,
  "total_payments" INTEGER /* Total payments made by the client */,
  "avg_delay_days" REAL /* Average payment delay days for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industry_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the invoice is issued to */,
  "fiscal_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fiscal year */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the invoice */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice */,
  "due_date_reminder" TEXT /* Due date reminder status of the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_fiscal_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_year_id") REFERENCES fiscal_years ("fiscal_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment is made for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "payment_confirmation" TEXT /* Payment confirmation status */,
  "payment_receipt_number" TEXT /* Payment receipt number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_delays_details" (
  "payment_delay_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment delay detail */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the delay is associated with */,
  "delay_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the payment was delayed */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the payment delay */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Resolution status of the payment delay */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Resolution date of the payment delay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_delay_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_delays_details_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., finance team, data analyst, executive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Role-based permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
